query: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'games' AND column_name LIKE '%date%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'games' AND column_name LIKE '%date%';
